Google AnalyticsIt tracks how the app is being used. It does not track or use any personal information.It will  accumulate usage data and transmit it over the internet.For instance, OS version, feature of the app being used.The data will be used to make the User Interface and Experience better.

Horoscope and Match MakingDuring Horoscope Making, Match Making, PDF Kundli we collects personal information including your name, gender, birth information, email address, and your place of birth and residence. This information is used to calculate your accurate horoscope. You do not have to provide any personal information to use our services.

Through Order FormsWe gather information that is required to fulfill our paid services though our order forms. This personal is maintained in strict confidence. As stated earlier, we guarantee confidentiality of our members' identity, birth details and the prediction made possible under legal regulatory and security environment. We further guarantees that no direct or indirect use will be made by us about any information that is revealed in the
prediction for a member, except for the explicit purpose of communicating the horoscope charts and predictions back to the member.

LocationWe collect information about your location when you use our services, which helps us offer features like Panchang Data, Chaughadiya Data and other related services. Your location can be determined with varying degrees of accuracy by: GPS, IP address, Sensor data from your device,Information about things near your device, such as Wi-Fi access points, cell towers, and Bluetooth-enabled devices. The types of location data we collect depend in part on your device.
